title: AIIMS Guwahati Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Research Scientist I Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS and BDS can apply for the AIIMS Guwahati Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit,...
